mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.sort_order, c.status, c.created_by, c.created_at, c.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_category sub WHERE sub.parent_id = c.id) AS child_count FROM workflow_category c ORDER BY c.parent_id ASC, c.sort_order ASC, c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.sort_order, c.status, c.created_by, c.created_at, c.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_category sub WHERE sub.parent_id = c.id) AS child_count FROM workflow_category c WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC, c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.sort_order, c.status, c.created_by, c.created_at, c.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_category sub WHERE sub.parent_id = c.id) AS child_count FROM workflow_category c WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workflow_category (name, parent_id, sort_order, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_category SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
